title: Job Openings at Supersaver Supermarket
content:
Supersaver Supermarket, established in 2013, is Nigeria's fastest-growing brand in the retail sector with branches in different parts of Lagos and massive expansion plans in various parts of Nigeria. Our businesses cut across retail trade, wholesale trade, manufacturing and Agriculture. 

We are  recruiting to fill the following positions below:

1.) Cake Baker

Job Location: Ajao Estate, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
     

            
    




	Bake a wide variety of cakes to meet customer demands and seasonal trends.
	Decorate cakes with creativity and precision, including custom designs for birthdays, weddings, and other special occasions.
	Ensure all cakes are produced to the highest standards of quality, taste, and presentation.
	 Work collaboratively with the bakery team to maintain an efficient workflow and ensure customer satisfaction.
	Adhere to all food safety and hygiene standards.
	Keep the bakery area clean and organized.
	Proven experience in cake baking and decorating.
	Exceptional skills in cake decoration, including piping, fondant work, and intricate design.
	Creativity and an eye for detail in designing and decorating cakes.
	Ability to work under pressure and manage multiple orders at once.
	Excellent time management and organizational skills.
	Passion for baking and delivering exceptional customer experience.


Requirement


	Interested candidates should possess relevant qualifications with experience.


Salary
N100,000 - N130,000 per month.

Application Closing Date: 16th July, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

 

2.) Pastry Chef Assistant

Job Locations: Ogudu - Ojota & Shangisha - Magodo, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Accurately measuring, weighing, and prepping raw ingredients (such as peeling fruit, lining molds, or setting up workstations) before baking begins.
	Mixing and Baking: Assisting with the mixing of batters, doughs, and creams, as well as monitoring baking times and temperatures to ensure perfect consistency.
	Dessert Assembly: Putting together components, fillings, and coatings for cakes, tarts, and pastries according to the head chef's recipes.


Requirement


	Interested candidates should possess relevant qualifications with experience.


Salary
N94,000 per month.

Application Closing Date: 16th July, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the  Job Position as the subject of the mail.

 

 

3.) Sales Associate

Job Location: Osapa, Off Jakande, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess relevant qualifications with experience.


Application Closing Date: 10th July, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using theJjob Position as the subject of the mail.

     

    

        Click here to Apply

  "description": "Regus is helping to change the way the World works by leading the Workplace revolution. We are the clear number one player in the rapidly growing, global flexible workplace market. We provide convenient, high-quality workplaces, for any period of time. We are the only provider with significant and growing national networks which provide an unrivalled global reach. We support our customers with the right workplace at the right price, in the right location, every time. We currently operate in over 100 countries, 900 cities and 3000 centres. We still think of ourselves as a high-growth start-up, just one that&rsquo;s been around a while, indeed our Founder is still our CEO.

We are&nbsp;&nbsp;recruiting to fill the position below:&nbsp;

&nbsp;Job Position: Customer Service Executive

Job Location: Abuja
Position Type: Full-Time&nbsp;

Job Description


	This position sits at the heart of our growing global organisation and is a critical role where you will have an opportunity to shine and deliver world-class customer service.&nbsp;
	You will be part of a dynamic team with amazing career opportunities, working regular and sociable hours and with the chance to unleash your full potential.&nbsp;


Responsibilities
We will expect you to:


	Give our customers and their guests a warm and friendly welcome, every day.
	Manage a range of on-site tasks to help our busy workspace run smoothly and happily.
	Above all, help your customers and colleagues have a great day at work.


What we can do for you
You are reading the right advert if you are looking for:


	A fun, challenging and rewarding career.
	Award-winning induction training and excellent ongoing learning and development.
	Fantastic promotion prospects.
	Generous, achievable incentives and sociable hours.
	Access to a comprehensive range of flexible, personalised workplace benefits that support mental, physical and financial wellbeing.


About You


	What really matters is that you&rsquo;ve got the right mindset. We&rsquo;ll provide everything else for you to build a fantastic career with IWG.&nbsp;
	All you need to bring is:
	
		Great communication skills and a love of interacting with people.
		A positive, outgoing and can-do attitude.
		The ability to take direction, learn new skills and apply them with confidence.
		The motivation to be your best every day &ndash; and the determination to be even better tomorrow.

Customer Service Executive Job at Regus




        
    

        
        Regus is helping to change the way the World works by leading the Workplace revolution. We are the clear number one player in the rapidly growing, global flexible workplace market. We provide convenient, high-quality workplaces, for any period of time. We are the only provider with significant and growing national networks which provide an unrivalled global reach. We support our customers with the right workplace at the right price, in the right location, every time. We currently operate in over 100 countries, 900 cities and 3000 centres. We still think of ourselves as a high-growth start-up, just one that’s been around a while, indeed our Founder is still our CEO.

We are  recruiting to fill the position below: 
     

            
    



 Job Position: Customer Service Executive

Job Location: Abuja
Position Type: Full-Time 

Job Description


	This position sits at the heart of our growing global organisation and is a critical role where you will have an opportunity to shine and deliver world-class customer service. 
	You will be part of a dynamic team with amazing career opportunities, working regular and sociable hours and with the chance to unleash your full potential. 


Responsibilities
We will expect you to:


	Give our customers and their guests a warm and friendly welcome, every day.
	Manage a range of on-site tasks to help our busy workspace run smoothly and happily.
	Above all, help your customers and colleagues have a great day at work.


What we can do for you
You are reading the right advert if you are looking for:


	A fun, challenging and rewarding career.
	Award-winning induction training and excellent ongoing learning and development.
	Fantastic promotion prospects.
	Generous, achievable incentives and sociable hours.
	Access to a comprehensive range of flexible, personalised workplace benefits that support mental, physical and financial wellbeing.


About You


	What really matters is that you’ve got the right mindset. We’ll provide everything else for you to build a fantastic career with IWG. 
	All you need to bring is:
	
		Great communication skills and a love of interacting with people.
		A positive, outgoing and can-do attitude.
		The ability to take direction, learn new skills and apply them with confidence.
		The motivation to be your best every day – and the determination to be even better tomorrow.
	
	
    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Graphics Designer",
  "description": "Peopleplusng - We provide exceptional HR support that empowers businesses to succeed. We&#39;re committed to delivering tailored solutions that meet the unique needs of each client, from recruitment and talent management to compliance and risk management.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Graphics Designer
Job Location: Abuja&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are looking for a highly creative and skilled Graphics Designer to develop stunning visual content that showcases ouraesthetic and wellness services , promotes our brand, and resonates with our target audience.
	The ideal candidate will possess excellent storytelling abilities, technical expertise, keen eye for design and attention to details.


Key Responsibilities


	Conceptualize and design visually stunning graphics, infographics, and marketing materials for various channels (social media, website, print, etc.).
	Develop and maintainbrand identity and visual guidelines.
	Collaborate with members of the marketing team to create cohesive campaigns and materials.
	Design engaging graphics for social media platforms, including Website, Facebook, Twitter, Instagram, and LinkedIn.
	Create informative and interactive infographics to communicate medical aesthetic-related information (e.g., treatment benefits, procedures).
	Develop presentation materials, including brochures, treatment flyers, Before-and-after graphics, and testimonial visuals.
	Assist in creating visual elements for videos, animations, and motion graphics.
	Collaborate with the wellnessteam to develop educational materials (e.g., treatment guides, FAQs).
	Stay up-to-date with design trends, best practices, and industry software.


Requirements


	Bachelor&#39;s degree in Graphic Design, Visual Communications, or related field.
	4-6years of experience in graphic design, in the aesthetics industry, Beauty and Skincare or preferably the healthcare industry.
	Proficient in Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign, etc.).
	Excellent creative problem-solving skills and attention to detail.
	Strong understanding of color theory,and composition.
	Ability to work under tight deadlines and manage multiple task.
	Effective communication and collaboration skills.
	Portfolio showcasing impressive design work.
	Experience with motion graphics and animation.
	Knowledge of UI/UX design.


Salary
N300,000 - N350,000 per month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CVs and Portfilio to peopleplusng@gmail.com using &quot;Application &ndash; Graphics Designer&quot; as the subject of the email.",

Graphics Designer Job at Peopleplusng




        
    

        
        Peopleplusng - We provide exceptional HR support that empowers businesses to succeed. We're committed to delivering tailored solutions that meet the unique needs of each client, from recruitment and talent management to compliance and risk management.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Graphics Designer
Job Location: Abuja 
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

            
    




	We are looking for a highly creative and skilled Graphics Designer to develop stunning visual content that showcases ouraesthetic and wellness services , promotes our brand, and resonates with our target audience.
	The ideal candidate will possess excellent storytelling abilities, technical expertise, keen eye for design and attention to details.


Key Responsibilities


	Conceptualize and design visually stunning graphics, infographics, and marketing materials for various channels (social media, website, print, etc.).
	Develop and maintainbrand identity and visual guidelines.
	Collaborate with members of the marketing team to create cohesive campaigns and materials.
	Design engaging graphics for social media platforms, including Website, Facebook, Twitter, Instagram, and LinkedIn.
	Create informative and interactive infographics to communicate medical aesthetic-related information (e.g., treatment benefits, procedures).
	Develop presentation materials, including brochures, treatment flyers, Before-and-after graphics, and testimonial visuals.
	Assist in creating visual elements for videos, animations, and motion graphics.
	Collaborate with the wellnessteam to develop educational materials (e.g., treatment guides, FAQs).
	Stay up-to-date with design trends, best practices, and industry software.


Requirements


	Bachelor's degree in Graphic Design, Visual Communications, or related field.
	4-6years of experience in graphic design, in the aesthetics industry, Beauty and Skincare or preferably the healthcare industry.
	Proficient in Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign, etc.).
	Excellent creative problem-solving skills and attention to detail.
	Strong understanding of color theory,and composition.
	Ability to work under tight deadlines and manage multiple task.
	Effective communication and collaboration skills.
	Portfolio showcasing impressive design work.
	Experience with motion graphics and animation.
	Knowledge of UI/UX design.


Salary
N300,000 - N350,000 per month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CVs and Portfilio to [email protected] using "Application – Graphics Designer" as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

title: Administrative / Operations manager Job at Just Recruitment Agency
content:
Just Recruitment Agency specialized services encompass a wide range of industries, including but not limited to IT, finance, sales, marketing, HR, and more. Whether your company operates in a niche market or a large-scale industry, our freelance recruitment agency have the expertise to source top talent that aligns with your specific requirements.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Administrative / Operations manager
Job Location: Ojo, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job review
     

            
    




	We are seeking an experienced and proactive Administrative/Operations Manager to oversee the daily operations of a furniture manufacturing company.
	The ideal candidate will have strong organisational, leadership, and problem-solving skills, with a background in manufacturing or production—preferably within the furniture industry.
	The role involves supervising operations, managing resources, and ensuring smooth workflow across departments to support efficiency, productivity, and growth.


Responsibilities


	Oversee day-to-day administrative and production operations to ensure seamless workflow.
	Supervise factory and office staff, ensuring high performance and accountability.
	Coordinate logistics, procurement, and material inventory for timely production.
	Monitor production schedules and ensure targets are met efficiently.
	Support HR processes including recruitment, onboarding, and attendance management.
	Implement operational policies and process improvements to enhance efficiency.
	Ensure compliance with safety, quality, and workplace standards.
	Manage documentation, reporting, and communication between management and departments.
	Handle vendor and client relations, including order fulfilment and delivery tracking.
	Provide regular operational updates and reports to management.


Requirements
Qualifications:


	Bachelor’s Degree in Business Administration, Industrial Management, or related fields
	Experience in furniture manufacturing or related production environments is highly preferred.
	Proven track record of supervising teams and coordinating factory operations.


Skills:


	Strong leadership and people management skills.
	Excellent communication and interpersonal abilities.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office tools (Word, Excel, PowerPoint).
	Ability to plan, prioritise, and execute tasks effectively.
	Strategic thinker with strong analytical and problem-solving ability.
	Detail-oriented, organised, and results-driven.


Personality Traits:


	Reliable and disciplined.
	Calm under pressure with a proactive mindset.
	Hands-on leader who enjoys structure and accountability.
	Adaptable and open to continuous improvement.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Aplications to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: For more information, Whatsapp: 08073393652.    

    

        Click here to Apply

title: Recruitment Officer Job at African Industries Group (AIG)
content:
African Industries Group (AIG) is a diversified global conglomerate with a legacy of 52 years of business excellence and sustainable growth. It is headquartered in Lagos, Nigeria. It has been contributing to Nigeria’s socio-economic growth and industrial development and is equally committed towards the nurturing and development of the local community.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Recruitment Officer

Job Location: Ikorodu, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities
     

            
    




	Manage the end-to-end recruitment process, from sourcing candidates to onboarding successful hires.
	Develop and implement effective sourcing strategies using job boards, LinkedIn, referrals, and professional networks.
	Screen CVs, conduct interviews, and assess candidates' qualifications and suitability for various roles.
	Coordinate interview schedules and facilitate communication between candidates and hiring managers.
	Build and maintain a strong talent pipeline for current and future hiring needs.
	Prepare recruitment reports and maintain accurate recruitment records and databases.
	Support employer branding initiatives to attract high-quality candidates.
	Ensure a positive candidate experience throughout the recruitment process.
	Collaborate with department heads to understand workforce requirements and recruitment priorities.
	Ensure recruitment activities comply with company policies and best HR practices.


Requirements


	Bachelor's Degree or HND in Human Resources, Business Administration, Psychology, or a related discipline.
	Minimum of 3 years of experience in recruitment or talent acquisition.
	Experience in a manufacturing, engineering, industrial, or related organization is highly preferred.
	Previous recruitment experience within a steel manufacturing company is an added advantage.
	Excellent communication, interviewing, and stakeholder management skills.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their updated CV to: [email protected] using "Recruitment Officer" as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply
